title: Process planting seed
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Process planting seed demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Select and prepare for processing of planting seeds and grains

pcs.text: Determine seed type, location and volume for processing from work plan and storage schedule
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine seed type, location and volume for processing from work plan and storage schedule?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine seed type, location and volume for processing from work plan and storage schedule.

pcs.text: Confirm seed processing requirements and specifications from work plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm seed processing requirements and specifications from work plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm seed processing requirements and specifications from work plan.

pcs.text: Confirm transfer and storage requirements of pre and post seed processing according to work plan and seed storage schedule
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm transfer and storage requirements of pre and post seed processing according to work plan and seed storage schedule?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm transfer and storage requirements of pre and post seed processing according to work plan and seed storage schedule.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Select seed processing machinery and equipment according to work plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select seed processing machinery and equipment according to work plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select seed processing machinery and equipment according to work plan.

pcs.text: Prepare seed processing machinery and equipment according to work plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare seed processing machinery and equipment according to work plan.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-operational checks of machine according to manufacturer specifications, workplace requirements and biosecurity procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-operational checks of machine according to manufacturer specifications, workplace requirements and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls.

pcs.text: Calibrate and adjust settings of machinery and equipment to comply with seed processing specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calibrate and adjust settings of machinery and equipment to comply with seed processing specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate and adjust settings of machinery and equipment to comply with seed processing specifications.

pcs.text: Perform a sample seed run to confirm settings and seed processing performance against specifications according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform a sample seed run to confirm settings and seed processing performance against specifications according to workplace procedures.

elements.title: Operate seed processing machinery and equipment

pcs.text: Transfer seeds for processing to storage bins and hoppers according to work plan, operator requirements and seed storage schedule

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer seeds for processing to storage bins and hoppers according to work plan, operator requirements and seed storage schedule.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use seed processing machinery and equipment safely according to manufacturer operating procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sample and monitor processed seed and make adjustments to machinery to maintain specified quality standards.

pcs.text: Monitor input and output seed storage capacities and implement mitigation procedures to maintain safe and efficient seed storage levels according to workplace procedures and storage schedule

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor input and output seed storage capacities and implement mitigation procedures to maintain safe and efficient seed storage levels according to workplace procedures and storage schedule.
